description: THIS IS A NATIONAL GUARD TITLE 32 EXCEPTED SERVICE POSITION THAT REQUIRES MILITARY MEMBERSHIP. This National Guard position is for a IT CYBERSECURITY SPECIALIST(INFOSEC), Position Description Number PDD2486P01 and is part of the Mississippi National Guard.

title: Biomedical Equipment Support Specialist
description: The Biomedical Equipment Support Specialist (BESS) (Biomedical Information Systems) provides clinical and administrative support to staff, patients, and administrators for all matters of concern relating to the facility wide lifecycle management of networks, networked medical equipment and associated systems.

title: Director, National Airspace System Security and Enterprise Operations
locations: Saipan, Mariana Island, Northern Mariana Islands
Vint Hill Farms Military Installation, Virginia
description: The Air Traffic Organization (ATO) comprises 35,000 controllers, technicians, engineers, and support personnel whose daily efforts ensure that aircraft are safe, separated, and on time. Technical Operations Services ensures a safe and efficient National Airspace System (NAS) by effectively managing air navigation services and infrastructure.

title: SUPERVISORY INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SPECIALIST
description: The National Defense Authorization Act for FY2020 approved a new, independent Space Force in the Department of the Air Force. The US Space Force is a military service that organizes, trains & equips space forces in order to protect US and allied interests in space and to provide space capabilities to the joint force. This new military branch is taking shape and recruiting! Click on "Additional Information" section below to view Eligibilities being considered and other IMPORTANT information

title: Cybersecurity Liaison Officer
description: About the Position: This position is a DOD Cyber Excepted Service (CES) personnel system position in the Excepted Service under 10 USC 1599f. Employees occupying CES positions are in the Excepted Service and must adhere to U.S. Code, Title 10, as well as Department of Defense Instruction 1400.25. This position is located at the U.S. Department of State.

title: Intelligence Community Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
organization: Office of the Director of National Intelligence
description: The Intelligence Community (IC) Chief Information Office (CIO) is responsible for advancing the Intelligence Community's mission by driving secure collaboration, integration, and information sharing; identifying and addressing information enterprise risks; and providing strategic leadership and oversight of the IC's enterprise architecture and enterprise information technology.

title: Intelligence Community Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
organization: Office of the Director of National Intelligence
description: The Intelligence Community (IC) Chief Information Office (CIO) is responsible for advancing the Intelligence Community's mission by driving secure collaboration, integration, and information sharing; identifying and addressing information enterprise risks; and providing strategic leadership and oversight of the IC's enterprise architecture and enterprise information technology.

title: Associate General Counsel
description: This position is designated as SES, General. USDA structures its SES positions into position levels. This is a position level 2 with a salary range of $204,122 to $216,010 per year. Exceptions to the salary cap may be considered in certain circumstances. SES employees are also eligible to receive bonuses and performance-based awards. Visit http://www.opm.gov/ses/ for additional information and benefits for SES employees.

title: Information Technology Specialist (Information Security)
description: About the Position: This position is located at the Joint Pathology Center in Silver Spring, Maryland. The role is primarily sedentary office work involving extended periods of computer use. The work environment consists of a collaborative office setting. Standard duty hours are 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM, though it may require participation in scheduled shift coverage or on-call support to maintain operational cybersecurity oversight.

title: IT SPEC (NETWORK) - TITLE 32
description: THIS IS A NATIONAL GUARD TITLE 32 EXCEPTED SERVICE POSITION. This position is for an IT Specialist (Network Services), Position Description Number D1822000 located in the 224th JCSS, Brunswick, GA. This is a full-time, Excepted Permanent, dual status position which requires Georgia Air National Guard Membership. Area of Consideration: Current members of the Air National Guard, Air Force Reserve or Air Force Active Duty component.

title: IT CYBERSECURITY SPECIALIST (PLCYPLN)
organization: Air Force Elements, U.S. Transportation Command
description: The position(s) covered by this vacancy announcement is in the Department of Defense (DoD) Acquisition Workforce Personnel Demonstration Project (AcqDemo). For more information please see: AcqDemo This position is part of the Air Force Elements, U.S. Transportation Command, Transportation Command. The incumbent will be responsible for ** Serves as a Cyber Operations Planner within the USTRANSCOM Command, Control, Communications and Cyber Systems Directorate.

title: IT SPECIALIST (INFOSEC)
description: This position is for a IT SPECIALIST (INFOSEC), PD# D2178P01, part of the Nevada Air National Guard. The purpose of this position is to serve as the Base Information Assurance Manager who is the wing commander's authority and focal point for Information Assurance. Manages the communication-computer security (COMPUSEC) program, Electronic Key Management System (EKMS), Emission Security, and Information Assurance Awareness Programs.

title: Attorney Advisor(International)(Public Notice Flyer)
description: The Commercial Law Development Program (CLDP) of the Office of the General Counsel, U.S. Department of Commerce, is seeking an individual with exceptional analytical, organizational, and interpersonal communication skills to join our team of international technical assistance Attorney-Advisors to engage in legal reform work related to telecommunications and the information and communication technology (ICT) sector, under the Digital Connectivity and Cybersecurity Partnership (DCCP).

title: Network Architect-DHA
description: IT Specialist (APPSW) Network Architect positions are being filled through the Office of Personnel Management's delegated Direct Hire Authority, open to all U.S. citizens. Selections made under this bulletin will be processed as new appointments to the civil service. Current civil service employees would, therefore, be given new appointments to the civil service. Under the provisions of the Direct Hire Authority, Veterans Preference and the "Rule of Many" do not apply.
